title: invalid expression in save command
body:
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/14ec3a64d9cd7f17de6858cbf476df8272e13fe8/cmd/podman/images/save.go#L105
```golang
saveOpts.Format != define.OCIManifestDir && saveOpts.Format != define.V2s2ManifestDir && saveOpts.Format == ""
```
shold remove `&& saveOpts.Format == ""`
